profiles.name: mlx_micro_smoke
profiles.description: Extremely fast profile (under 5 seconds) to test pipeline plumbing, M1/M2/M3 device initialization, and gradient flow on MLX.

profiles.name: mlx_fast_convergence
profiles.description: Fast profile (under 60 seconds) to verify synthetic competency convergence (e.g. identity, sine) before moving to full market data on MLX.

profiles.name: mlx_bounded_market
profiles.description: Short market profile (under 5 minutes) running on a single stablecoin pair to ensure feature extractors and loss objectives don't OOM or NaN out on real distributions.
